default_policy.review_rule: Remote GEOrank hosts must use HTTPS. Plain HTTP is accepted only for loopback development instances.

scripts/georank_client.py.purpose: Authenticate to and operate the user-selected self-hosted GEOrank HTTP API.
scripts/georank_client.py.custom_url_policy: A custom host is accepted only through --base-url, GEORANK_BASE_URL, or an existing private session; non-loopback HTTP is rejected.
scripts/georank_client.py.auth: GEORANK_TOKEN or an owner-only session file; login password comes from a hidden prompt or GEORANK_PASSWORD.
